channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: CIF NorCal Open champ Archbishop Mitty hires former Marin Catholic volleyball coach Jake Spain to run program
item.description: Archbishop Mitty's new volleyball coach, Jake Spain, has extensive experience at the high school and club level in the North Bay. He'll have a tall task ahead replacing outgoing coach Jon Wallace.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: San Diego FC will take steps to stop the homophobic chant that marred its inaugural home match
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — San Diego FC intends to take steps to discourage its fans from engaging in the homophobic chant that marred the Major League Soccer expansion club's inaugural home match last weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Legge to become 1st woman since Danica Patrick to compete in Cup Series race. Will race at Phoenix
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Katherine Legge will become the first woman in a NASCAR Cup Series race since Danica Patrick in 2018 when the veteran makes her debut Sunday at Phoenix Raceway. Legge will drive the No. 78 Chevrolet for Live Fast Motorsports.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Yankees' AL Rookie of the Year Luis Gil to start season on injured list with shoulder injury
item.description: Yankees right-hander Luis Gil will start the season on the injured list because of a high-grade lat strain in his pitching shoulder that will prevent him from throwing for at least six weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge denies Alberto Osuna's bid for injunction as he attempts to play baseball for Tennessee
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Alberto Osuna’s bid to play baseball for defending College World Series champion Tennessee received a setback Monday when a federal judge denied his bid for a preliminary injunction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics honor Somerset teen who saved choking girl
item.description: Ben Courville, a junior firefighter with the Dighton Fire Department, saved a girl last summer from choking at a Fall River restaurant.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Eagles set to release Super Bowl champion cornerback Darius Slay, AP source says
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Philadelphia Eagles are set to release six-time Pro Bowl cornerback Darius Slay, a person familiar with the decision said Monday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the team has not yet announced the decision.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers' next destination and Myles Garrett's future headlined the buzz from the NFL combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Matthew Stafford chose to stay in Los Angeles. Deebo Samuel was sent to Washington. Many NFL players will be on the move when free agency begins next week and the foundation for a lot of transactions was built at the scouting combine last week.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn atop AP Top 25 for 8th straight week; No. 6 St. John's has highest ranking in 34 years
item.description: Auburn and Duke remain atop the AP Top 25. The rest of the poll was a big jumble. Auburn was the unanimous pick at No. 1 for the second straight week, receiving all 61 votes from a media panel in the poll released on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL scouting combine helps some, raises questions about others and creates intrigue as draft looms
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — When the NFL scouting combine opened, everyone wanted to see Heisman Trophy winner Travis Hunter work out at two positions and how the top quarterback duel would go. Those hopes were dashed in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ACC, FSU, Clemson reach proposed settlement to end legal fight, change money distribution: AP source
item.description: A person familiar with the situation says the Atlantic Coast Conference, Clemson and Florida State have reached a proposed settlement that would end their legal fight and change the league’s revenue-distribution model.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Attendance and scoring are up two-thirds into PWHL's 2nd season with expansion plans on horizon
item.description: Attendance is up, and so is scoring two-thirds of the way through the PWHL’s second season, with the six-team league closing in on a decision to expand by as many as two franchises for next year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USF football’s 2025 schedule revealed
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The Bulls learned the course they will chart in the 2025 South Florida Football Season presented by Tampa General Hospital, its third under Head Coach Alex Golesh, on Friday when the American Athletic Conference released the 2025 schedules for member schools.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Johnny Manziel's mother arrested in Texas on DWI charge: report
item.description: Michelle Manziel, the mother of former NFL and college football star Johnny Manziel, was reportedly arrested in Texas on Saturday on a DWI charge.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Christopher Bell holds off Daytona 500 winner William Byron at Circuit of the Americas for second straight win
item.description: Christopher Bell took home the EchoPark Automotive Grand Prix on Sunday; it's the first time in two years someone has won two consecutive races.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Highsmith goes from making the cut to a PGA Tour winner at the Cognizant Classic
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Joe Highsmith could feel himself crumbling under the pressure at the Cognizant Classic. This was on Friday, when the only thing at stake was making the cut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pitt football player, HSE grad dies in Fishers crash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — An 18-year-old football player died in a crash in Fishers late Saturday night. According to a press release sent by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office Sunday morning, the crash happened around 9:03 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFLPA Survey: Matt Eberflus rated worst head coach in 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The NFL Players Association released the results of their annual players survey Wednesday at the NFL Scouting Combine.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Diana Taurasi of the Phoenix Mercury retires after 20 WNBA seasons, 3 titles and 6 Olympic golds
item.description: Diana Taurasi is retiring after 20 seasons, ending one of the greatest careers in women's basketball history.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL and DOUG FEINBERG AP Basketball Writers, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago Bears NFL Scouting Combine Preview: Bears picks, workout schedule and more
item.description: The Chicago Bears have seven picks in the 2025 NFL Draft, including five picks in the first five rounds, and are looking to address needs in the offensive line, defensive line, running back, tight end, and safety positions.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey scores 25 points as the Bulls snap a 6-game skid with a 142-110 rout of the 76ers
item.description: Josh Giddey had 25 points, 16 rebounds and six assists as the Chicago Bulls ended a six-game skid by routing the Philadelphia 76ers 142-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
